mapper.select:
SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, mj.name AS majorName, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.max_std AS maxStd, l.rem_std AS rem_std, l.status FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id
l.year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND status = 'approved'
AND l.academic_year = #{academicYear}
AND mj.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{majorName}, '%')
AND l.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lectureName}, '%')
ORDER BY l.name
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(l.credit), 0) FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} AND l.year = YEAR(CURDATE())

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, mj.name AS majorName, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.max_std AS maxStd, l.rem_std AS rem_std, l.status, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM attendance WHERE course_id = c.course_id) AS isAttended FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id LEFT JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} AND l.year = YEAR(CURDATE()) ORDER BY l.name
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM course WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND member_id = #{memberId};
mapper.update: UPDATE lecture SET rem_std = rem_std - 1 WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND rem_std > 0
mapper.select: SELECT lecture_id AS lectureId, major_id AS majorId, type AS lectureType, academic_year AS academicYear, max_std AS maxStd, rem_std AS remStd FROM lecture WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}
SELECT member_id AS memberId, major_id AS majorId, academic_year AS academicYear FROM student WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT course_id FROM course WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT member_id FROM course WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lecture_schedule ls_new JOIN lecture_schedule ls_mine ON ls_new.day_of_week = ls_mine.day_of_week -- 기존의 시간 중복 체크 로직 AND ( ls_new.start_period BETWEEN ls_mine.start_period AND ls_mine.end_period OR ls_new.end_period BETWEEN ls_mine.start_period AND ls_mine.end_period OR ls_mine.start_period BETWEEN ls_new.start_period AND ls_new.end_period ) JOIN course c ON ls_mine.lecture_id = c.lecture_id -- [수정 핵심] 신청 내역 중 '올해' 강의만 가져오도록 lecture 테이블 조인 JOIN lecture l_mine ON c.lecture_id = l_mine.lecture_id WHERE ls_new.lecture_id = #{lectureId} -- 신청하려는 강의 AND c.member_id = #{memberId} -- 내 신청 내역 AND l_mine.year = YEAR(CURDATE()) -- ★ 올해 강의만 비교 대상으로 한정 AND ls_mine.lecture_id != #{lectureId} -- 자기 자신 제외
